title: CJEU Privacy Citation Network
description: Citations between CJEU judgments citing GDPR / Directive 95/46

most_cited_paragraphs.title: Most-cited paragraphs
most_cited_paragraphs.description: Which paragraphs of which cases are cited most often across the corpus
most_cited_paragraphs.sql:
SELECT c.cited_celex,
       c.cited_no_case,
       cs.title,
       cp.paragraph,
       COUNT(*) AS times_cited
FROM   citation_paragraphs cp
JOIN   citations c ON cp.citation_id = c.id
LEFT   JOIN cases cs ON cs.celex = c.cited_celex
GROUP  BY c.cited_celex, cp.paragraph
ORDER  BY times_cited DESC
LIMIT  50

most_cited_cases.title: Most-cited cases
most_cited_cases.description: Which cases (regardless of paragraph) are cited most often
most_cited_cases.sql:
SELECT c.cited_celex,
       c.cited_no_case,
       c.cited_ecli,
       cs.title,
       COUNT(*)                     AS total_citations,
       COUNT(DISTINCT c.source_celex) AS citing_cases
FROM   citations c
LEFT   JOIN cases cs ON cs.celex = c.cited_celex
WHERE  c.cited_celex IS NOT NULL
GROUP  BY c.cited_celex
ORDER  BY total_citations DESC
LIMIT  50

most_citing_paragraphs.title: Most-citing source paragraphs
most_citing_paragraphs.description: Which paragraphs in the source judgments contain the most outgoing citations
most_citing_paragraphs.sql:
SELECT source_celex,
       source_no_case,
       source_paragraph,
       COUNT(*) AS outgoing_citations
FROM   citations
WHERE  source_paragraph IS NOT NULL
GROUP  BY source_celex, source_paragraph
ORDER  BY outgoing_citations DESC
LIMIT  50

citation_counts_by_source.title: Citation counts by source case
citation_counts_by_source.description: How many outgoing citations each source judgment contains
citation_counts_by_source.sql:
SELECT source_celex,
       source_no_case,
       COUNT(*) AS citations_made
FROM   citations
GROUP  BY source_celex
ORDER  BY citations_made DESC

paragraph_citation_detail.title: Paragraph citation detail
paragraph_citation_detail.description: Full list: source paragraph → cited case + paragraph (most frequent first)
paragraph_citation_detail.sql:
SELECT c.source_celex,
       c.source_no_case,
       c.source_paragraph,
       c.cited_celex,
       c.cited_no_case,
       cp.paragraph        AS cited_paragraph,
       COUNT(*)            AS occurrences
FROM   citation_paragraphs cp
JOIN   citations c ON cp.citation_id = c.id
GROUP  BY c.source_celex, c.source_paragraph, c.cited_celex, cp.paragraph
ORDER  BY occurrences DESC, c.source_celex, cp.paragraph
LIMIT  200
